case_title: EDUARDO COVITA ET AL VS. NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOMES & SERVICES

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-11-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 (CHANGE OF MIND OF PLTFF) TRIAL OF AUG-10-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (FILED AFTER 30 DAY TIME LIMIT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COVITA, EDUARDO SMITH, MARTY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-22-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOMES & SERVICES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS EDUARDO COVITA AND MARTY SMITH. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES DAIVD BERG & BELINDA ONG, PRESIDENT/CEO AND CONTROLLER, RESPECTIVELY, FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOMES & SERVICES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COVITA, EDUARDO SMITH, MARTY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOMES & SERVICES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
